title: RFX Operational Maturity Layer — N09–N21
rfx_role: non-owning phase label; observer, verifier, packager, summarizer, and repair-input generator only
authority_confirmed: RFX does not decide, approve, certify, enforce, promote, authorize, adjudicate, or own. All such authority remains with canonical owners declared in docs/architecture/system_registry.md.

items.failure_prevented: Regression to known historical RFX/CI failures when corpus drift goes undetected.
items.signal_improved: Regression coverage density; historical failure traceability across 10 known failure categories.
items.red_team: RT-N09 — mutate expected historical outcome produces rfx_v2_outcome_mismatch and status=drifted.

items.failure_prevented: Static forbidden authority phrases persisting in fixture source, bypassing authority-shape checks.
items.signal_improved: Fixture hygiene; authority-shape false-negative rate reduction.
items.red_team: RT-N10 — static forbidden phrase in fixture produces rfx_fixture_static_forbidden_phrase; clean text passes.

items.failure_prevented: Operators receiving raw artifact walls instead of compact, actionable state summaries.
items.signal_improved: Operator surface clarity; artifact-wall detection rate.
items.red_team: RT-N11 — raw artifact wall field (cases/violations/entries) produces rfx_operator_surface_raw_artifact_leak.

items.failure_prevented: Unjustified helpers surviving without failure-prevention or signal-improvement claim.
items.signal_improved: Helper justification coverage; consolidation candidate count.
items.red_team: RT-N12 — helper with no justification produces rfx_simplification_no_justification and recommendation=fold_or_deprecate.

items.failure_prevented: Failures that cannot be reproduced because minimal reproduction inputs were never captured.
items.signal_improved: Replay reproducibility rate; failure replay packet completeness.
items.red_team: RT-N13 — packet without reproduction_inputs produces rfx_replay_missing_inputs and status=incomplete.

items.failure_prevented: Incidents closing without any regression eval coverage, allowing same failure to recur.
items.signal_improved: Incident-to-eval conversion rate; eval candidate coverage of known incidents.
items.red_team: RT-N14 — incident with no candidate and no rationale produces rfx_bridge_no_eval_candidate.

items.failure_prevented: Stale proof inputs silently passing verification.
items.signal_improved: Evidence freshness compliance rate; stale-input detection coverage.
items.red_team: RT-N15 — evidence record older than max_age_seconds produces rfx_freshness_stale and status=stale.

items.failure_prevented: RFX proof artifacts diverging from CL proof shape, causing silent misalignment in downstream consumers.
items.signal_improved: RFX↔CL proof shape alignment rate; field-presence coverage.
items.red_team: RT-N16 — missing required CL field produces rfx_cl_proof_missing_rfx_field and status=misaligned.

items.failure_prevented: PR log data entering RFX without structured failure extraction, hiding failure patterns.
items.signal_improved: PR-failure-to-RFX conversion rate; structured failure record coverage.
items.red_team: RT-N17 — raw string log entry produces rfx_pr_ingestion_unstructured and normalized_count=0.

items.failure_prevented: Repair prompts lacking root cause, owner context, validation commands, or guard constraints.
items.red_team: RT-N18 — missing root cause/owner/validation/guards each produce distinct reason codes; always_constraints always present.

items.failure_prevented: Merges proceeding with missing proof artifacts, absent guard conditions, or incomplete test evidence.
items.red_team: RT-N19 — missing rfx_proof_ref/guard/pytest_passed each produce distinct block reason codes.

items.failure_prevented: Operators encountering a reason code with no plain-language action, blocking diagnosis and repair.
items.signal_improved: Operator handbook coverage; plain-language action completeness.
items.red_team: RT-N20 — reason code entry without plain_action produces rfx_handbook_missing_action and status=incomplete.

items.failure_prevented: Duplicate or unjustified helper modules surviving without governance oversight.
items.signal_improved: Consolidation candidate identification rate; helper justification coverage trend.
items.red_team: RT-N21 — unjustified helper produces rfx_bloat_unjustified_helper and action=review_for_removal.

validation_results.rfx_super_check_overall: fail (authority_shape_early_gate pre-existing failure; 114 rename-required entries existed before this PR)

pre_existing_findings.status: pre-existing failure on main branch before this PR (114 rename-required entries)

remaining_risks: authority_shape_early_gate has 114 pre-existing rename-required entries not introduced by this PR.
rfx_operator_handbook and rfx_bloat_burndown produce governance recommendations but do not enforce removal decisions — those require governed PR review.
rfx_evidence_freshness_gate relies on callers supplying accurate reference_time_seconds; clock skew could produce false fresh results.
